plugins.name: corgi
plugins.description: AI skills for authoring corgi-compose.yml, running a stack detached and waiting until healthy, debugging local or deployed issues, generating the CI pipeline that boots the whole stack and runs cross-repo e2e on every PR (GitHub Actions or GitLab CI), tracker-side planning (Linear/Jira standup, triage, and epic-decompose tied to real PR+CI state across services), picking up build-ready tickets (explicit links or the agent-labelled queue) and dispatching them to stories, suggesting ranked product + engineering improvements, shipping batches of Linear/Jira issues or a feature description as draft PRs/MRs, reviewing existing PRs/MRs with inline suggestions, and running a supervised autopilot loop that drains the agent ticket queue into draft PRs with one spec gate per batch, a heartbeat, and a kill switch, plus a committed workspace-memory store the skills read before acting and append to (confirmed) after a notable fix, and running suggest proactively on a schedule to auto-propose (or, opt-in, auto-file as a draft) one rate-limited tracker ticket for the top win
